name: GPT-5.6 Model Router
long_description: GPT-5.6 Model Router is an explicitly invoked governed Codex plugin. Pure schema-v4 policy recommends Luna, Terra, or Sol routes while the root retains authority over ordinary work. Trusted bundled hooks validate route intents before Agent execution, constrain delegation and write ownership, and require hash-bound independent Sol/high review for critical work unless an authorized exception is recorded. Ten schema-v5 roles are leaves by default, with an exact one-level grant permitting bounded depth-2 descendants. Transactional setup enables depth two and preserves unrelated configuration. Hook state remains local under PLUGIN_DATA and stores hashes and route metadata, never raw prompts, messages, diffs, tool output, or secrets. The plugin has no MCP server, hosted backend, connector, analytics, or credential collection.
starter_prompts: $setup-gpt56-model-router Install or upgrade the governed router and trust its hooks.
$route-gpt56-task Handle this task with governed cost-aware GPT-5.6 routing.
$route-gpt56-task Handle this critical change with verified independent review.

bundled_hooks.local_state: PLUGIN_DATA only; hashes and route metadata; no raw prompts, messages, diffs, tool output, or secrets

availability: All countries and regions where OpenAI permits plugin distribution
